reviews.review_description: My daughter wants to be an astronaut and I was going to show her this, but after I was as patient as possible, waiting between 30 seconds to sometimes near 2 minutes for buffering to stop, I knew that there is no way my daughter could be inspired by this. Simple solution the the biggest problem your app has: make all the videos downloadable to store in the Meta Quest 3 headset and we wont have to experience 80% buffering and 20% of the excellent potential your app has. Just let us store the video files and make it work that way, locally. Otherwise, no matter whether we have 2.4 or 5 or 6 or 7 wifi or cable internet or satellite, we won't have to be saddened by the experience.

This content creates so much potential.  It fails to deliver the awesome content in a satisfactory way with constant buffering. I have 1Gig broadband and even with everything else going on in the house I am able to get in excess of 400 mbps.  I have a brand new 3S and yet my enjoyment of the content is diminished.  Before getting the app I watched the Blue Marble orbit films without difficulty - they were amazing.  Within the app they buffer and are much less enjoyable as a result.

Just installed app a day or two ago and have not been able to get past welcome/intro screen. There are instructions to reach out and ‘grab’ a holographic sphere for closer inspection. I follow the simple instructions to ‘reach out’ ‘grab’ sphere and ‘pull closer’, but nothing happens. I’m not quite ready to give up and uninstall app. So, I will keep attempting to get past this screen for the moment. But if I cannot get it to work, I will just delete the app. BTW: I’m using a Quest 2.

*Update: Thanks for the response. I increased the lighting and was finally able to to make it work!

developer_response.body: Hi Chris. Thanks for taking the time to contact us. We're sorry to hear you've had these issues. To help, make sure your hands are being tracked properly and that you’re in a well-lit room. To complete the Grab section, look directly at the object you want to grab, raise your hand in front of your face with your arm fully extended, close your hand, and pull your fist backward. To push back, raise both hands in a “hold up” motion and push them away from you. If the issue continues, please email us at customer_support@felixandpaul.com with your device’s OS version and build number so we can assist you further.

reviews.review_description:
Great presentation with fun trinkets to collect and play with on your highres journey to the stars!

One thing though, MUST be fixed. Allow us to buffer enough video to play a video without lag.
OR let us download the entire video before viewing. It is extremely of putting to have a black screen with a loading circle appear stuttering throughout the video.
We want to see the video in the highest resolution possible.
Also, please up the resolution of the wonderful menu screens for the Quest 3.

I think this is hands down the best cinematic VR content ever made, but I preferred how the old app let you download the content instead of streaming it. Nothing ruins your immersion more than the video pausing to buffer, and I feel like the quality as a bit higher too. Even on 2gbps fiber I still experience buffering at times. 

Otherwise I love the updates to the app, and the hand tracking controls are very intuitive.

This app would probably be good if it worked. The hand tracking took many attempts to work, and is still very temperamental, and will only sort of work in a very brightly lit room. The streaming is also terrible even with a high speed broadband connection, and some of the footage is so dark and poor quality. Overall - a frustrating experience. The app feels broken, hand tracking should be optional, and half of the footage is unwatchable.

developer_response.body: Hi Nathan1974. Thanks for taking the time to contact us. We're sorry to hear you've had these issues. Please email us at customer_support@felixandpaul.com so we can try and assist further. If you can, please let us know both the OS version and OS build number of your device.

reviews.review_title: How can VR be taken seriously?
reviews.review_description: Videos with resolutions that are indecent to watch (worse than 480p), constant loading blocks, menus and tracking that are truly terrible in terms of resolution and hand tracking, and annoying HUDs that are impossible to remove from the screen. Giving this app 5 stars is a disservice to VR. Great content, but technically horrible for Quest 3.

developer_response.body: Hi SattaVR. Thanks for taking the time to contact us. We're sorry to hear you've had these issues. Please email us at customer_support@felixandpaul.com so we can try and assist further. If you can, please let us know both the OS version and OS build number of your device.

reviews.review_description: Starting off with a helpful tip. Make sure you are in a well-lit room so your headset can see your hands for tracking. I had to turn on an extra light. It has many of the Legacy versions experiences but has new ones as well. This is wonderful to share with family and friends and a really great teaching tool. I would love the option to download the experiences so I would not have to rely on an internet connection like you were able to do with the Legacy edition because internet availability is not everywhere. I hope they will give us the option to download them sometime in the near future. I do love the way they put this together. This is so much fun. Thank you
Every time when I try to grab the orb in the tutorial nothing happens when I grab look and reach my hand out this is bs

reviews.review_title: No option to use control instead of hand
reviews.review_description:
I could not get past the intro as it defaults to Hands Only, this feels very ableist and does not cater to users who need to use controllers. Why force a system or not give an option. 
I did try, but with zero option to bypass the hand training the app is useless.
I gave 2 stars because the silhouette did look cool, but unable to use to try to to the hand only limitation.

Congratulations on the worst app downgrade ever. Where to begin? Hand tracking only is crazy. Bespoke navigation gestures. Aliasing, oh the aliasing. Is the video quality any better? I can't tell because of the buffering. I'm glad you clearly didn't play test this because if you did and you still released it, well holy moly.

How to fix. Add controller support. Allow local high quality caching of the videos. I just want to watch the videos in as hi-res as possible.

I've been a massive fan of Felix and Paul since the GearVR days but this is a total trash fire. Utterly embarrassing and what a waste of time sending cameras to literal space, when the presentation is this shockingly bad.

Please allow us to access the old app so I can actually watch the videos I paid for.

Zut alors.
The best app to fly in space :) . thanks to the creators

Playback is laggy, stutter and interrups often. I have 1 gig optic internet broadband, and it can't handle loading. And quality is pretty bad. Sure, devices and tech can't handle better quality in 3d, but may be you can give us a choice like 2k 360 3d, 4k 180 3d or 8k 180 flat. And please, please - make preload option!

developer_response.body: Hi netkot, thank you for taking the time to share your feedback with us. We truly appreciate you helping us improve, and we’ll make sure your comments are shared with the team so we can keep refining the experience.

reviews.review_description: Very buggy. Getting past the tutorial was a chore. But once I did it was OK. Then the bugs started. Reaching out to the various objects or was it artifacts? Only the football worked. This is basically a stitched together collection of videos. Accessing them is clunky and occasionally freezes. I'm also sure I've seen a lot of these videos individually before. When I tried to pull in the moon it didn't work. It actually came to me when I pushed away from it. It is very unpolished and not ready for this store. The fact that this is not exactly revolutionary in any way, one would have expected a better experience. Each individual video is very good. This is just a very clunky way to put them together. I uninstalled as I've seen most of the content and interaction is not a fun experience.

developer_response.body: Hi Maccyb123. Thanks for taking the time to contact us. We're sorry to hear you've had these issues. Please email us at customer_support@felixandpaul.com so we can try and assist further. If you can, please let us know both the OS version and OS build number of your device.

reviews.review_description: i was actually quite excited to play this game however when you boot up the game and try to actually do the first tutorial it will not allow you to pass it whatsover. the devs really need to get on this and fix it as the recent reviews clearly reflect this issue.. please fix it i would love to play this

reviews.review_description: The problem is lagging. It would be much better if video download is allowed within the app, because lagging is a big issue. I give 4 stars because of great content. Regards
i can’t get past the tutorial.  tried it twice and it doesn’t  recognize my hands/ controllers at all .. will try again but cmon guys this basic stuff …

reviews.review_title: Absolutely out of this world. Love it!
reviews.review_description:
Difficult to explain, it is an experience in itself. Seeing our beautiful planet from an astronaute perspective is something I feel lucky to have seen. 

Thank you so much to the team who has made this possible and sharing it for free makes me write this message to say how grateful I am.

Thank you! 🌎🪐❤️

Do not try to use controllers ,if you want to get results,had a try hand controls do work !!!! but it kept on buffering seems such a pity 

as this could be so educational.  But I know early days

reviews.review_description: wasn't aware Meta removed the tap controllers together feature to use hand tracking, the flight video is very  slow, dispite the message saying it maybe othwise.  the room mapping to use collected items hangs for ages while scanning, it also disables the inset meta button, had to turn off by Emergency shutdown,
just installed and can't get paet tutorial, as the hands appear for a moment then disappear.

Please make sure the Hand and Tracking setting is turned on and that you’re in a well-lit environment. reviews.review_description: app is great the tracking and everything works smoothly check this out if you have not yet its worth it...

developer_response.body: Hi FreezeTime, thank you so much for your message. We're glad to read you have enjoyed the experience!

reviews.review_description: Was very frustrated with the experience to start - could not get past the basic tutorial - then read a comment here about a well light room - turned on one more light in my VR space and all good.  So if you cant get hand tracking to work ( no spoilers) then increase the light in your room - once you do you wont be disappointed

I don’t know, it just feels like all the hand gestures, pushing and pulling, floating icons, and the whole new "experience" UI design in general have made it feel more like some gimmicky, amateur “VR” app from a decade ago compared to how it used to be. All the AR features feel gimmicky too. I remember when it was just simple image menus where you could pick the video in front of you to watch—and I actually preferred that, because it was simple, clean, fast and, most of all, just worked.

And some of the clips are so short they end before anything really happens (I something thought I'd accidently exited out of them or something), and the longer ones often have pretty low video quality. That really takes away from the magic and impact of watching them in full-scale stereoscopic 3D in VR.

Basically, I’m not a huge fan of this current version, to be honest.

developer_response.body:
Hi inceptional, thank you for taking the time to share such detailed feedback with us.
We’re sorry to hear that the current version isn’t meeting your expectations. Your comments about the UI, hand gestures, AR features, and overall viewing experience are valuable, and we understand how the simplicity and immediacy of the previous design may have felt more intuitive to you. We’ll make sure your feedback is shared with our team as we continue refining the experience.
